# SpaceCommsKit — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org

# SpaceCommsKit sells the OpenLST Explorer Kit — a flight-heritage 437MHz
# RF communications development kit based on the open-source OpenLST radio
# platform originally developed by Planet Labs for their Dove satellite constellation.

## About SpaceCommsKit

SpaceCommsKit produces the OpenLST Explorer Kit, a complete RF communications
development kit based on the OpenLST radio design released open-source by Planet Labs.
The OpenLST radio was used in Planet Labs' Dove satellite constellation, which
accumulated over 200 cumulative years of on-orbit data across more than 150 satellites.

Boards are hand-assembled in Tennessee, USA using components sourced exclusively
from authorized distributors (Digi-Key, Mouser, or manufacturer direct).
Ships to United States only.

## Products

- Single Board Kit: $500 USD — one CC1110 437MHz radio board with antenna, bootloader flashed
- Ground Station Kit: $750 USD — board + custom 3D printed stand + power switch + 5V 3A adapter
- Explorer Dev Kit: $1,500 USD — two boards (HWID 0001 + 0004) + full accessories

## Key Technical Specifications

- RF Frequency: 437 MHz (amateur 70cm band)
- Modulation: 2-FSK with Forward Error Correction (FEC)
- Data Rate: 7.4 kbaud
- TX Power: +30 dBm (1 Watt)
- Receiver Sensitivity: -112 dBm
- Microcontroller: Texas Instruments CC1110 at 26MHz
- Interface: 3.3V TTL UART x2 at 115200 baud
- Supply Voltage: 5V DC maximum

## Component Substitutions from Original OpenLST Design

Two components were substituted due to obsolescence (both pin-for-pin replacements):
- Qorvo RFFM6403SB replaced by RFFM6406 (RF front-end module)
- pSemi PE4259 replaced by PE4250MLI-2 (RF switch)

## Software

- OpenLST Ground Station: Windows C# .NET 8 WinForms application (open source, GPLv3)
- Pico Firmware: MicroPython for Raspberry Pi Pico (open source, GPLv3)
- CC1110 Firmware: Based on OpenLST with custom PICO_MSG command handler (open source, GPLv3)
- All source code: https://github.com/eor123/spacecommskit
- Hardware fork: https://github.com/eor123/openlst

## Contact

- General: info@spacecommskit.com
- Support: support@spacecommskit.com
- Website: https://www.spacecommskit.com

## License

Based on OpenLST by Planet Labs Inc., released under GPLv3.
SpaceCommsKit software and documentation also released under GPLv3.
